description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with stages static, build, test, deploy, and security, defining variables for Debian and GNURadio images, APT repository URLs, and submodule strategy. In the static stage add a style job that uses the ${GITLAB_CI_STYLE_IMAGE_DEBIAN} image, runs apt-get update, installs gnupg, libcurl4, wget, adds the LLVM APT repository, installs clang-format-13 and python3-pip, pip installs cmake_format, then executes clang-format-13 dry‑run on all header and source files and runs cmake-format checks on CMakeLists.txt files; also include the sign_off job and the SAST and secret_detection jobs imported from the standard GitLab templates. In the build stage add a placeholder debian job (no script) and in the deploy stage add a placeholder deploy job (no script). In the test stage add a test job that uses the ${GITLAB_CI_TEST_IMAGE_DEBIAN} image, installs libhamlib-utils and local .deb packages, verifies the Python GNURadio bindings, compiles multiple flowgraphs with grcc, starts rigctld in the background, runs test/scripts/rigctl_scenario.sh with frequency 435000000 and timeout 15, and finally compiles the rigctl flowgraph. Include the MergeRequest‑Pipelines, Jobs/SAST, Jobs/Secret-Detection, sign‑off, and OBS Debian templates via the include section.
